zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite Perche於大約1080年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne40歲，母親Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy35歲。她於1100年與Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1156年8月27日在法國諾門迪艾艾福享年77歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾萊斯 普雷奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite Perche于大约1080年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne40岁，母亲Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy35岁。她于1100年与Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1156年8月27日在法国諾門迪艾艾福享年77岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾萊斯 普雷奧。

nameMeanings.name: Perche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Deitrich, Gunter, Otto.
Danish: from Lærkia, a medieval nickname meaning ‘lark’.
Danish: habitational name from a place in Westphalia, Germany.

variants.name: Lerch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Hans, Horst, Arno, Egon, Erwin, Gerhard, Guenter, Gunter, Helmut, Ingeborg, Karl-Heinz.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German lerche, German Lerche ‘lark’, probably a nickname for someone with a good singing voice, or a metonymic occupational name for a bird-catcher. As a Jewish surname, it is most probably artificial.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite Perche was born about 1080, in Normandy, France, her father, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, was 40 and her mother, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, was 35. She married Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick in 1100, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 August 1156, in Évreux, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Les Préaux, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite Perche est née environ 1080, à Normandie, France, son père, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick en 1100, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 août 1156, à Évreux, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite Perche um 1080 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne 40 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy 35. Sie hat 1100 in Warwickshire, England Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. August 1156 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite Perche è nata il circa 1080 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick nel 1100, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1156, nel Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite Percheが約1080年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagneは40歳，母Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucyは35歳であった。1100年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでHenry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1156年8月27日にフランスノーマンディエウアevレウックスで77歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアレス プルeアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite Perche(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1100년 영국 워윅실르에서 Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 8월 27일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 레스 플e오스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite Perche nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick em 1100, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1156, em Évreux, Eure, Normandie, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite Perche родилась около 1080 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick в 1100 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 августа 1156 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности лесь прeаукс, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite Perche nació aproximadamente 1080, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick en 1100, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1156, en Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
